tagline: Chiropractic care meets the ancient science of Ayurveda
seoDescription: Thomas Chiropractic & Ayurveda in Santa Rosa, CA. Dr. Helen Mary Thomas, DC blends 40+ years of chiropractic experience with Ayurvedic medicine, Zerona laser weight loss, Life Vessel stress relief, and NAET allergy elimination. Call (707) 527-7313.
heroHeading: Whole-Body Healing in the Heart of Sonoma County
heroSubheading: Dr. Helen Mary Thomas, DC combines modern chiropractic and diagnostic technology with the ancient science of Ayurveda to get to the core of your health.
highlights: Over 40 years of clinical experience (chiropractic since 1982)
Doctor of Chiropractic, Palmer College of Chiropractic, Davenport, Iowa
Trained in Ayurveda since 1984 with Deepak Chopra, Vasant Lad, J.R. Raju and mentor Dr. Narendra Pendse, MD
Author of 'Ayurveda: The A-Z Guide to Healing Techniques from Ancient India'
Integrative care: chiropractic, Ayurveda, laser weight loss, stress relief and allergy elimination under one roof
aboutBody: Dr. Helen Mary Thomas is a native Californian who has practiced in Sonoma County for more than 40 years. She began her chiropractic career in 1982 after graduating from Palmer College of Chiropractic in Davenport, Iowa, and was among the first chiropractors to expand into Ayurvedic medicine.

Beginning her Ayurvedic training in 1984, Dr. Thomas studied with Deepak Chopra, Vasant Lad, and J.R. Raju, completed coursework at Maharishi International University, and undertook multiple residencies in Pune, India under her mentor Dr. Narendra Pendse, MD. She is the author of 'Ayurveda: The A-Z Guide to Healing Techniques from Ancient India.'

At Thomas Chiropractic & Ayurveda, Dr. Thomas uses up-to-date diagnostic technology alongside modern alternative medicine and the ancient science of Ayurveda. Her goal is to get to the core of illness and guide each patient toward lasting physical and mental wellness, with personalized care designed to heal as quickly and effectively as possible.

services.title: Chiropractic Care
services.description: Gentle, modern chiropractic adjustments, including Impulse iQ technology, to address pain and support whole-body alignment and function.

services.title: Ayurvedic Medicine
services.description: Personalized Ayurvedic care drawing on decades of study in India, addressing root causes through this ancient holistic healing science.

services.title: Zerona Cold Laser Weight Loss
services.description: A non-invasive cold laser approach to body contouring and weight loss, offered as part of Dr. Thomas's integrative wellness program.

services.title: Life Vessel Stress Relief
services.description: Deep relaxation and stress-reduction therapy using light, sound, infrared warmth, and vibration to calm the autonomic nervous system and support healing.

services.title: NAET Allergy Elimination
services.description: Natural allergy elimination treatment aimed at reducing sensitivities and the body's reactions to allergens.

services.title: Indigestion & IBS Care
services.description: Ayurvedic-based treatment for chronic indigestion, IBS, and digestive complaints, a longstanding focus of Dr. Thomas's practice.

notes:
CONFIRMED — same business verified by matching phone (707) 527-7313 across her live site, Healthgrades, Yelp, and Wellness.com.

LIVE SITE: Her real, reachable website is https://www.drhelenthomasdc.com (NOT the dead http://www.DrHelenMaryThomasDC.com given in the brief). Business name on site: 'Thomas Chiropractic & Ayurveda'. Slug returned as requested: thomas-ayurveda.

ADDRESS DISCREPANCY (important): Brief and older directory/Yelp listings show 2880 Cleveland Ave, Suite 4, Santa Rosa, CA 95403. Her current live website AND Healthgrades both list 2635 Cleveland Ave, Suite 2, Santa Rosa, CA 95403. A BestProsInTown review note from Feb 2019 explicitly says 'New address: 2635 Cleveland Av.' She appears to have MOVED from 2880 to 2635 Cleveland Ave. Recommend confirming current address before publishing; I treated 2635 Cleveland Ave Suite 2 as current.

FOUNDING: 'Est. 1982' = year she began chiropractic practice (per her own About page and multiple bios). The Thomas Chiropractic & Ayurveda CLINIC as a combined integrative practice formed later (Ayurvedic services added ~1985, Ayurvedic practitioner since 1987 per directory bios). Used 1982 as the practice's origin.

OWNER/FAMILY: Owner Dr. Helen Mary Thomas, DC. One source (selfgrowth bio, paraphrased via search) states she and her husband Dr. Craig Thomas established the center. NOT independently confirmed on her live site, so I did not put the family/husband detail in the about copy — flagging as unverified.

CREDENTIALS verified: Palmer College of Chiropractic graduate; Ayurveda study since 1984 with Deepak Chopra, Vasant Lad, J.R. Raju, mentor Dr. Narendra Pendse MD (Pune/Mumbai); Maharishi International University coursework; residencies in Pune, India. Author of 'Ayurveda: The A-Z Guide to Healing Techniques from Ancient India' (ISBN 9781491034927, confirmed on Amazon/Barnes & Noble/AbeBooks).

SERVICES verified from her site nav and pages: Impulse iQ chiropractic, Ayurveda, Zerona cold laser weight loss, Life Vessel stress relief, NAET allergy elimination, indigestion/IBS treatment. Only Life Vessel and Ayurveda had full descriptive copy on the page I fetched; other service descriptions are accurate paraphrases of how each modality is generally described plus her site's framing — wording is mine, not verbatim from her, so treat as paraphrased.

HOURS: NOT found on any source — left empty. Do not invent.

REVIEWS/RATING: No usable star rating found. Healthgrades shows 0 reviews. Yelp page returned HTTP 403 (could not fetch directly); a search snippet paraphrased a positive Yelp review ('extremely knowledgeable and confident healer, just an awesome person') but I could NOT verify the exact wording or author, so I left testimonials empty and omitted a rating object rather than fabricate one. BestProsInTown lists '6 reviews' but no visible rating value or quotable text. Recommend pulling real Google Business Profile / Yelp reviews manually.

PHOTOS: Only ONE plausibly-real owned image found — IMG_2988.jpg on her About page (a 661KB uploaded JPEG, labeled as personal photo, almost certainly Dr. Thomas; I could not visually confirm contents because the binary wasn't rendered). All other site images are AdobeStock stock photos (AdobeStock_222279831, AdobeStock_307815443) and were EXCLUDED. No verified storefront/team photos.

SOCIAL: No Facebook/Instagram/Google profile URLs confirmed — left empty.
